document_title: XIMA Assessment v1.1 — Human Review Pack
purpose: Complete structured export of the XIMA Assessment v1.1 for human and external AI validation. Contains all questions, scoring logic, mapping rules, and change log from v1.0.

v1_1_changes.cognitive_tension_enforcement: All MC items must encode meaningful trade-offs between two legitimate strategies. Social desirability gradients prohibited.
v1_1_changes.cp_micro_refinements: q16, q21 rewritten across all fields to remove Knowledge leakage and desirability gradient (v2).
v1_1_changes.knowledge_q13_revision: q13 revised across all 4 fields for epistemic discipline framing.
v1_1_changes.drive_validation: All Drive MC items validated via synthetic stress test (N=5000).
v1_1_changes.creativity_redesign: 4-strategy framework: Recombination, Reframing, Iterative Prototyping, Constraint Pivot.
v1_1_changes.weakness_first: Assessment prioritizes identifying candidate's 2 weakest pillars with highest growth leverage.

pillar_definitions.computational_power: Ability to structure ambiguity under constraints — decomposing complex problems into structured analytical components under time and information pressure.
pillar_definitions.communication: Adaptive message calibration — adjusting abstraction level, medium, and tone to preserve signal clarity across mismatched audiences under pressure.
pillar_definitions.knowledge: Epistemic discipline under uncertainty — how a candidate acquires, validates, and updates mental models when established assumptions fail.
pillar_definitions.creativity: Ability to generate, recombine, and test novel approaches under real constraints, balancing originality with feasibility (constraint navigation).
pillar_definitions.drive: Growth Velocity — the rate at which a candidate improves on their weakest skills over time, measured longitudinally through behavioral baselines and progress snapshots.

scoring_formulas.mc_scoring: Each option has score_value 0–3. Pillar score = mean(selected_score_values for that pillar's questions) / 3 * 100.
scoring_formulas.computational_power_note: CP is 100% MC-driven — no open answer blend.
scoring_formulas.drive_baseline: Drive_MC_baseline = mean(q5, q10, q15, q20 score_values) / 3 * 100

drive_longitudinal.step1: Identify 2 weakest pillars at baseline (earliest snapshot)
drive_longitudinal.step2: delta = latest_score - baseline_score for each weak pillar

ximatar_assignment.guest: Top-2 pillar heuristic with hardcoded if/else chain
ximatar_assignment.authenticated: Euclidean distance to 12 canonical profiles in ximatarTaxonomy.ts

questions_by_field: See companion HTML file for full inline question bank across all 4 fields with trilingual text and score values.
